description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, felt tape lining on the inside of the neck and chest print Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments If music is your passion and your head turns almost in reflex to the sound of strings and drums, then this t-shirt has been especially designed for you by lee. Look all 'metal' with the gold tinted print on the chest, while you feel perfectly at ease in the heat in this soft cotton T-shirt. Pair it with rugged denims and a pair of sneakers for that ultimate casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
